records.question: Which books titled Bloody Mary : Lady Liberty by Garth Ennis with exactly 4 issues were published by Thomson Reuters in March 2008 and priced at most 6000000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE publication.price <= 6000000.0 AND book.title = 'Bloody Mary : Lady Liberty' AND publication.publication_date = 'March 2008' AND book.issues = 4.0 AND book.writer = 'Garth Ennis' AND publication.publisher = 'Thomson Reuters'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT book.Book_ID 
FROM book 
JOIN publication ON book.Book_ID = publication.Book_ID 
WHERE book.Title = 'Bloody Mary : Lady Liberty' 
AND book.Issues = 4.0 
AND book.Writer = 'Garth Ennis' 
AND publication.Price <= 6000000.0 
AND publication.Publication_Date = 'March 2008' 
AND publication.Publisher = 'Thomson Reuters'

records.question: Which books titled Dead Corps were written by Christopher Hinz and have at most 4.0 issues?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
WHERE book.issues <= 4.0 AND book.writer = 'Christopher Hinz' AND book.title = 'Dead Corps'
records.pred_sql: SELECT book.Book_ID FROM book WHERE Issues <= 4.0 AND Writer = 'Christopher Hinz' AND Title = 'Dead Corps'

records.question: What books titled Cyberella, written by Howard Chaykin with at most 12 issues, were published by Wiley in October 2005 priced exactly 3000000.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT book.book_id FROM book
JOIN publication ON book.book_id = publication.book_id
WHERE book.writer = 'Howard Chaykin' AND book.issues <= 12.0 AND publication.price = 3000000.0 AND publication.publication_date = 'October 2005' AND publication.publisher = 'Wiley' AND book.title = 'Cyberella'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT book.Book_ID 
FROM book 
JOIN publication ON book.Book_ID = publication.Book_ID 
WHERE book.Writer = 'Howard Chaykin' 
AND book.Issues <= 12.0 
AND book.Title = 'Cyberella' 
AND publication.Price = 3000000.0 
AND publication.Publication_Date = 'October 2005' 
AND publication.Publisher = 'Wiley'
